title: Name Tailor
description: A lightweight mod that lets you rename items without anvils or levels, allowing for on-the-go renaming
body:
**NameTailor** is a simple yet effective mod that allows players to rename items without the need for anvils or experience levels. Whether you want to rename items on the go or use name tags for quick customization, this mod provides an easy and accessible way to personalize your gear.

## Features
- **Rename Items Freely** – No anvils, no XP costs, just type and rename.  
- **Use Name Tags for Renaming** – Use name tags to rename items for convenient customization.  
- **Accessible Anywhere** – Rename your items anytime without needing a workstation.  
- **Intuitive Interface** – A clean and simple UI for easy renaming.
